query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  l.telefone as leadTelefone,
  u.name as corretorNome
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
INNER JOIN users u ON f.corretorId = u.id
WHERE f.status = 'pendente'
  AND DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY f.dataFollowUp;
